title: Capybara's Liminal Spaces
description: Possibly your new favorite liminal space mod!
body:
# Capybara's Liminal Spaces
  

### THE NEWEST UPDATE NEEDS GECKOLIB TO RUN!
 

## I HIGHLY RECOMMEND A MOD LIKE JEI! There are some crafting recipes.

 

 

## What do I do?

First, you need to craft the old computer and probably place it near a village.

A villager might think that using the computer is a good idea and will offer trades.

Buy a certain item from him and use it on the computer.

 

## Why am I in the backrooms?

I wanted to add this as I felt it would be easy and important!

I know it's not very original so I have a solution.

You can comment level ideas on my Youtube channel!

 

## What do I do in the backrooms?

Look for something that stands out.

You can also punch the ground for a chance at finding a dollar.

 

## Are there any monsters?

yes

 

## What inspired you to make this?

Kane Pixels and

"The Backrooms: Withering Reality" on the Bonelab Mod.io

 

## My console is blowing up with warning messages!

This mod uses features to generate those random rooms. Idk why it spams warnings

in the log!

 

## Can I...

Yes you can use it for modpacks and everything just please give me credit!

Also don't upload this anywhere else!

This mod is currently only availaible for Curseforge, Modrinth and Mcreator, don't trust anywhere else!

 

## Here is the new mod trailer:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fjsbhYgXLPk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I hope you enjoy my mod! I will update it!
